name: Apify Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server
description: Implementation of an MCP server for all Apify Actors enabling interaction with one or more Apify Actors defined in the MCP Server configuration. Allows AI assistants to use Apify Actors as tools for various scraping and data extraction tasks.

tools.name: apify-slash-rag-web-browser
tools.description: Tool wrapping the Apify RAG Web Browser Actor for web search and scraping.

tools.name: apify-slash-facebook-posts-scraper
tools.description: Tool wrapping the Facebook Posts Scraper Actor to extract data from Facebook posts.

tools.name: apify-slash-google-maps-with-contact-details
tools.description: Tool wrapping the Google Maps Email Extractor Actor to extract contact details.

tools.name: apify-slash-google-search-scraper
tools.description: Tool wrapping the Google Search Results Scraper Actor to scrape SERPs.

tools.name: apify-slash-instagram-scraper
tools.description: Tool wrapping the Instagram Scraper Actor to scrape Instagram data.

tools.name: add-tool
tools.description: Add a tool, Actor or MCP-Server to available tools by Actor ID or tool full name. Does not execute the tool, only adds it.

actorName.description: Add a tool, Actor or MCP-Server to available tools by Actor ID or tool full name. Tool name is always composed from `username/name`

tools.name: remove-tool
tools.description: Remove a tool, an Actor or MCP-Server by name from available tools.

toolName.description: Tool name to remove from available tools.

tools.name: get-tool-details
tools.description: Helper tool for getting tool details.

authorization.name: authorization
authorization.description: Provide your APIFY_TOKEN as Bearer token in the Authorization header.

openapi.description: OpenAPI specification for the MCP server HTTP API
